Interface ISpectralSensor2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to a Spectral Sensor Interface.

[Guid("F98254EC-C7E5-4EE1-9724-C152BA6B2E36")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpectralSensor2 : ISpectralSensor
